params.name: Acta Apostolicae Sedis
params.description:
On Aug 21, 1908 AD, Pope Pius X changed the original private publication into the Divine See Bulletin.
The Acta Apostolicae Sedis is the monthly gazette of the Divine See. As the authoritative record of the documents, exhortations, and decrees of the Divine See, it carries considerable weight. The contents are frequently referenced in documents and decrees issued by the Divine See of later generations.
